partial_progress.details: Phase 7 COMPLETED: eliminated 2 sorries in BidirectionalReachable.lean linearity proofs using gamma-enrichment technique. Phases 8-14 remain NOT STARTED. Build passes (758 jobs, 0 errors).

completion_data.completion_summary: Eliminated 2 sorry gaps in canonical linearity proofs (forward and backward) by enriching compound formulas with a separating formula gamma from M1 \ M2, making Case 1 of the linearity axiom impossible via gamma AND neg-gamma inconsistency. BidirectionalQuotient LinearOrder instance is now sorry-free.
